title: Human-in-the-Loop Integration System
description: Ensure human oversight for critical decisions while maintaining automation

principles.description: Any decision that could impact business reputation or finances
Automate data processing, human reviews the output
examples: AI generates content → Human reviews → Human publishes
AI analyzes data → Human reviews insights → Human makes decisions

principles.description: When automation fails, route to human for handling
examples: Error in processing → Alert human → Human investigates
Uncertain decision → Route to human → Human decides

templates.name: content_generation_workflow
templates.description: AI generates content with human approval
steps: Content sent to human review queue
If rejected: return to AI for revision

templates.name: data_analysis_workflow
templates.description: AI analyzes data, human reviews insights
steps: Insights sent to human for review

templates.name: customer_communication_workflow
templates.description: AI drafts responses, human approves before sending
steps: Response sent to human for approval

approvalMechanisms.implementation: Use email node with approval links

humanEscalation.description: Escalate to human after max retries
